name: React Native — monorepo & design-system imports (LOW–CRITICAL)
description: CRITICAL for native modules: packages with native code must be depended on by the app package so autolinking sees them. Keep single versions across the monorepo (overrides/syncpack). LOW: re-export third-party UI from a design-system folder so app code imports `@/components/*` not deep package paths.

metadata.intent: Fix autolinking and dependency drift in React Native monorepos; centralize design-system imports

must_use: Native deps listed in the app `package.json`
Single resolved version per native module across packages
must_not: Native-only modules installed only in a shared package the app does not depend on
conventions: Re-export shared primitives from `components/` or `ui/` package entrypoints.

steps.description: Ensure every native module used at runtime is a direct dependency of the mobile app package (autolinking scans app `node_modules`).
Deduplicate versions (pnpm overrides / yarn resolutions / npm overrides + syncpack) to avoid duplicate native copies and subtle runtime conflicts.
Route app imports through design-system modules so refactors swap implementation without touching every screen.
